ksa_text: Knowledge of privacy risk assessment and continuous monitoring, including Privacy Impact Assessment methodologies, risk scoring and prioritization, anomaly detection for privacy violations, threat assessment techniques, and continuous monitoring frameworks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Security & Platform Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the Domain Data Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Domain Data Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Security & Platform Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for Domain Data Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Domain Data Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Security & Platform Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Domain Data Lead. All passes support exclusion.
